name: Spillway Overlook
text:
Spillway Overlook enters the battlefield tapped.
When Spillway Overlook enters the battlefield, scry 1, then roll a six-sided die. On a 6, put a sludge counter on a creature you control — something rose to the surface while you were looking away.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
flavorText: Best view in town. Worst thing to view.
